title: Stale Child Continuation Suppression
goal: Implement #443 so finished-work inspection no longer promotes child archive continuations that have been consumed by a later parent closeout.
non_goals: Do not implement the full parent autopilot runner in this slice.
Do not add provider-specific GitHub refresh behavior.
Do not change external tracker state until the slice is proven.

intent.outcome: Suppress stale child continuation pressure after later parent validation consumes it while preserving historical closeout visibility.
intent.constraints: Keep archived residue inspectable; only remove superseded continuations from current execution pressure.
intent.latitude: Local implementation may use conservative archive-reference heuristics if tests pin the intended behavior.
intent.escalation: Stop if distinguishing consumed continuations requires a new closeout schema rather than a bounded inspection fix.

execution.next_step: Archive this slice and continue the parent lane with the structured-reference-roles active item.

invariants: Compact summary must keep current execution pressure distinct from historical residue.
Archived execplans remain the source of closeout history.
External tracker issues remain source references, not execution authority.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: The parent autopilot lane should make plan -> implement -> evaluate continuation behavior first-class enough that long lanes do not rely on chat memory.

required_continuation.required follow-on for the larger intend: The structured-reference-roles slice and the remaining dogfooding slices remain open after this slice; the parent lane remains open until the loop itself is first-class.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after this closeout, promote the next issue in the long-session-dogfooding-intent-loop lane

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Cleaner execution readiness for the new dogfooding issue lane.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: Full autopilot runner, structured reference roles, GitHub adapter refresh, source payload classification, CLI authority preflight, and historical pressure prioritization.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: Focused tests and live summary check.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: structured reference roles, unless the parent loop command needs to come first.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest those new issues and address them first.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: New dogfooding findings should become checked-in planning and execution should start before older lanes.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Ingest the dogfooding issue batch and implement #443 first because current summary shows stale child continuation pressure.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Verify the package surfaces, not this chat, show the new issue lane and cleaner continuation routing.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: planning package installer/tests plus checked-in planning surfaces for this active lane
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "finished_work_inspection"; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <paths> --format json
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Do not redesign closeout schemas in this slice.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: GitHub issue closure, generated command packages, or unrelated historical archive cleanup.

stop_conditions.stop when: The focused test and summary prove superseded child continuations are not promoted as current pressure.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A robust fix requires the structured reference roles follow-on.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: If implementation expands into GitHub sync or full autopilot execution.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Record blocker in this plan and keep #443 open.

context_budget.live working set: summary output, dogfooding report, #443 issue intent, finished-work inspection code and tests
context_budget.recoverable later: full external evidence and archived closeout history
context_budget.externalize before shift: update this plan's execution_run and closure_check
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Implemented #443 stale continuation suppression after ingesting the dogfooding issue batch.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before changing schemas or provider-specific GitHub behavior.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Remove stale child continuation pressure without losing historical evidence.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep planning state checked in; preserve archive history; prove with tests.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact conservative supersession heuristic for this slice.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Supersession cannot be inferred safely without new structured closeout roles.

immediate_next_action: Add a focused regression test for a child archive whose continuation is consumed by a later parent archive.
Implement conservative suppression of superseded candidates from current execution readiness.
Run focused planning tests and live summary.
invariants: Do not treat superseded history as active continuation pressure.
Do not hide the fact that a child archive was partial when it closed.
Do not rely on GitHub state as the execution authority.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: A later closed archive can conservatively supersede a child continuation when it references all of that child's tracked refs or the child source plan.
open_questions_to_close: Should future structured reference roles replace this heuristic?
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/stale-child-continuation-suppression.plan.json .agentic-workspace/planning/reviews/long-session-dogfooding-report-2026-04-27.review.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py --format json
completion_criteria: Focused regression proves a consumed child continuation is counted as superseded and not promoted.
Live summary no longer recommends the already-consumed source-payload/root-CLI child continuations as current execution pressure.
Planning state records remaining parent lane work after #443.

execution_run.handoff source: user request plus checked-in planning surfaces
execution_run.what happened: Ingested the dogfooding issue batch, implemented supersession-aware finished-work inspection, and validated #443.
execution_run.scope touched: planning package finished-work inspection plus checked-in planning evidence
execution_run.changed surfaces: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml; .agentic-workspace/planning/external-intent-evidence.json; this execplan; dogfooding report; planning installer and tests
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "finished_work_inspection"; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <slice paths> --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #443 is complete; parent lane remains open and structured-reference-roles is promoted next.

finished_run_review.intent served: yes for #443; the parent lane remains open
finished_run_review.config compliance: used checked-in planning surfaces and package proof selector
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low for this bounded slice; the next slice should replace the heuristic with explicit roles

proof_report.validation proof: focused regression, full planning installer tests, ruff, proof selection, doctor, and live summary
proof_report.proof achieved now: Consumed child continuations are counted as superseded history and excluded from current derived follow-up candidates.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Live summary shows superseded_continuation_count and no longer lists the root-CLI/source-payload consumed child archives as current top continuation pressure.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Ingest and address the new dogfooding issues first.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #443 was satisfied, but the requested dogfooding batch remains open.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger user or product outcome separately from the bounded slice so later archive, review, and continuation decisions stay honest.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: This slice narrows to current stale-continuation pressure while preserving the larger parent loop lane.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: After this slice, does the package point to the true next continuation instead of stale child residue?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #443 is validated, while the parent and remaining dogfooding slices remain open.
closure_check.reopen trigger: summary again promotes an already-consumed child archive as current execution pressure

execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused regression, full planning installer tests, ruff, proof selector, doctor, and live summary
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: dogfooding report and external intent evidence carry the promoted issue and closeout proof

continuation: The parent lane remains open after #443.

drift_log: 2026-04-27: Ingested the dogfooding issue batch and promoted #443 as the first active slice.
2026-04-27: Completed #443 and routed continuation to structured-reference-roles.
